baseline.question: Under the Emerald Health Sciences / Dr. Murray Consulting and Licensing Agreement, what is the monthly payment EHN agrees to pay Dr. Murray during the first twelve months, and when is each payment due?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 554 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: EHN will pay Dr. Murray $8,333 per month, payable at the end of each month during the first twelve months that the agreement is in effect, as stated in Section 5.1.

baseline.question: Under the Reed's / Full Sail Brewing Company Recipe Development Agreement, what royalty does Dr. Murray receive when net sales of Dr. Murray Products reach between $3,500,001 and $5,000,000 in a 12-month period?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 564 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: When net sales of Dr. Murray Products fall between $3,500,001 and $5,000,000 per 12-month period, Dr. Murray receives an annual royalty of $250,000, payable no later than January 30th of the following year, per Section 5.3 of the Emerald Health agreement.

baseline.question: Under the VGrab Asia / Duesey Coffee Mobile Application Development Agreement, what is the total project quotation in USD, and how is payment allocated among the three developers?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 543 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: The total project quotation is $200,000.00 USD. Payment is allocated as follows: Ms. Chen Weijie (Lead Developer) receives USD 100,000, Mr. Zheng Qing receives USD 50,000, and Mr. Gu Xianwin receives USD 50,000, all payable within 7 days upon completion and handover of the Project to VAL, per Clause 5.

baseline.question: Under the i-Escrow / 2TheMart Co-Branding and Advertising Agreement, how is the advertising fee per Transaction Inquiry calculated?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 557 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: The advertising fee per Transaction Inquiry is calculated by multiplying 0.025% by the amount of the average Transaction from all Customers in the preceding quarter, per Section 5.1. This Adjusted Rate may be revised by mutual consent to reflect present market conditions.

baseline.question: Under the FreeCook / Mitchell's Web Advance Website Design Agreement, what is the total Contract Price, and how is the payment structured between deposit and final payment?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 554 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: The total Contract Price is $5,000. The Client makes a prepayment of $1,900 upon signing and pays the remaining $3,100 upon completion of the Scope of Work, per Section 2 of the Agreement.

baseline.question: Under the FreeCook / Mitchell's Web Advance Agreement, what is the surcharge rate for rush work performed outside normal business hours?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 561 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: The surcharge for rush work is the standard hourly rate of $40 plus twenty-five percent (25%), as specified in Section 3 of the Agreement.

baseline.question: Under the Eco Science Solutions / Stephen Marley Endorsement Agreement, what is the monthly cash payment to Stephen Marley for Social Communication, and within how many business days is equity consideration issued?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 570 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: ESSI pays Stephen Marley $10,000 per month for Social Communication activity. ESSI also issues 1,000,000 shares of restricted common stock within ten business days of execution of the Agreement, per Section 5.

baseline.question: Can Pelican Delivers fire Seattle Software Developers on the spot if they discover the developers shared Pelican's secret business information with a competitor?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 538 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: Yes. Under Section 11.2(c), misappropriation or unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information by the Receiving Party is grounds for immediate termination by notice, without any cure period.

baseline.question: Under the deal between Emerald Health and Dr. Murray, can Dr. Murray keep getting royalty money even after he stops doing the consulting work?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 566 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: Yes. Under Section 6.3(c), if EHS or EHN terminates the Agreement, the royalty payment obligations under Section 5.3 survive termination, meaning Dr. Murray continues to receive royalties on Net Sales of Dr. Murray Products for as long as those products are sold, even after the Services Term ends.

baseline.question: Under the Reed's / Full Sail Recipe Development Agreement, who pays for the process of developing the product recipes, and who bears the cost of Reed's own people participating in the project?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 542 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: Company (Full Sail) is responsible for all costs relating to the development of the Recipes and Deliverables. However, Reed's bears the costs and expenses relating to the involvement of Reed's own personnel and contractors, per Section 2 of the Agreement.

baseline.question: Under the Seattle Software Developers / Pelican Delivers agreement, if Developer completes the project but Client fails to submit a Change Request within the time period after the Acceptance Test Date for a Modified Deliverable, what is the legal consequence?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 520 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: Under Section 3.5, if Client receives a Modified Deliverable and does not notify Developer of any further failures, objections, changes, defects, or bugs within five (5) days of receipt, the Modified Deliverable will be deemed accepted by Client.

baseline.question: Under the FreeCook / Mitchell's Web Advance agreement, if Mitchell's Web Advance does not receive required materials from Natalija Tunevic in a timely manner, what happens to the project due dates?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 614 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: Under Section 1(b), the Client (Natalija Tunevic) acknowledges that any due dates set forth in the Scope of Work are subject to delay if Company does not receive the required materials or documentation in a timely manner or in the required format, or if approvals are delayed by Client, or if the Scope of Work is changed by Client.

baseline.question: Under the VGrab / Duesey Coffee Mobile Application Development Agreement, if the Duesey Coffee project remains incomplete when the 6-month agreement period expires, does the contract simply end?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 575 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: No. Under Clause 14, the Agreement continues until full performance by both parties, even if that extends beyond the maximum six (6) month period stated in Clause 3. The Agreement only terminates upon full performance by both parties, or earlier termination under the Agreement's termination provisions.

baseline.question: Under the MusclePharm / Schwarzenegger agreement, if the agreement expires at the end of the Initial Term without renewal (because the $20M threshold was not met), can MusclePharm continue to sell existing Licensed Product inventory? For how long?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 567 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: Yes. Under Section 9(c), if MusclePharm terminates or the agreement expires, it may sell off remaining Licensed Products for six (6) months, continuing royalty payments.

baseline.question: Under the FreeCook / Mitchell's Web Advance Agreement, if Mitchell's Web Advance completes the website but Natalija Tunevic later discovers spelling errors in the content she submitted, can she require Mitchell's to fix them at no extra charge?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 579 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: No. Under Section 1(c), the Client is solely responsible for proofreading submitted content. Mitchell's Web Advance will not correct typographical errors without an additional Change Order fee.

baseline.question: Under the Emerald Health / Dr. Murray agreement, if Dr. Murray discloses EHN's product formula to a third party during a public conference, what legal remedy does EHN have under the confidentiality provisions?
baseline.generated_answer:
[LLM stub — set GROQ_API_KEY to enable real answers]
(Would answer using 557 word prompt)
baseline.ground_truth: Under Article 7, disclosure of Confidential Information is prohibited throughout and after the term. EHN may seek binding arbitration (Article 9(6)) and injunctive relief to prevent further disclosure.
